name: Live Current Media Inc.
summary: Live Current Media Inc. operates as a digital technology company in the sports/gaming sector in the United States. It is developing SPRT MTRX, a gaming app that allows players bid on the final scores of NHL, NFL, and NBA games that is available in iPhone and Android versions. The company was formerly known as Communicate.com Inc. and changed its name to Live Current Media Inc. in May 2008. Live Current Media Inc. was founded in 1995 and is based in Reno, Nevada.
